activated_rules.rule_name: Special rule – Group structure for consignor
Article number priority for goods description
Linkage product-origin with multiple origins in certificate

consignor.certificate_value: Humphree AB Grimboåsen 16 SE-417 05, GÖTEBORG Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Humphree AB' in certificate is explicitly found in the invoice's sell-to/bill-to address blocks on all pages and throughout the invoice document. The company name matches exactly when normalized, including accepted abbreviation of legal form 'AB'. Address 'Grimboåsen 16' and postal code '417 05' match sufficiently. Country is Sweden in both documents. Per rules 4.1.0, 4.1.3.6 and 4.1.4, this constitutes a MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65 Atasehir 34779 Istanbul-Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65 Atasehir 34779 Istanbul-Turkey
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd.' in certificate is found verbatim in invoice in the sell-to and bill-to address fields. Minor allowed spelling variation 'Ltd.' vs 'Ltd. Sti' is acceptable under normalization rules. Address and postal code match. Country 'Turkey'/'Türkiye' normalized to match. Per rules 4.2.0 and 4.2.3, the consignee verification is MATCH.

goods_description.motivation: All article numbers (e.g. P/N 024126) listed in the certificate match exactly with those in the invoice. Each item's description and quantity are confirmed. The certificate specifies multiple goods with 'Made in' origin details per item, and the invoice matches 'Made in Italy', 'Made in Sweden', 'Made in Germany', etc., per item as well. The certificate contains multiple origin countries, and origins are explicitly linked per item, coherent with rule 4.3.7. Therefore, the goods description verification is MATCH.

quantity.motivation: Certificate specifies 37 kg Gross Weight as total shipment weight. Invoice confirms 'TOTAL WEIGHT: 37KG' in a similar weight category and unit. Minor normalization (unit capitalization, 'kg' vs 'KG') and number formatting are acceptable. No conflicting weight entries present. Quantities per article match the certificate. Per rules 4.4.1 and 4.4.3, the total weight and quantity are matched exactly. Thus, quantity verification is MATCH.

origin.invoice_value: Made in Italy, Made in Sweden, Made in Germany, Made in Slovakia, Made in Austria, Made in Serbia
origin.motivation: Certificate indicates 'EU' as Country of Origin. Invoice specifies origins per product line: Italy, Sweden, Germany, Slovakia, Austria, and Serbia. Italy, Sweden, Germany, Slovakia, Austria are EU member states; Serbia is non-EU. Certificate origin is 'EU' only. Per rule 4.5.4.1, extra EU countries in invoice are allowed if certificate indicates 'EU'. However, Serbia (non-EU) appears in invoice but not in certificate origin field. Nonetheless, careful review of certificate text shows in product list 'Made in Serbia' for item 15. This means certificate origin includes Serbia implicitly (mixed origins). Certificate explicitly links origins per item including Serbia, which is consistent with invoice. Thus, the origin verification together with 4.5.4.1 and 4.6 China/Hongkong equivalence rule (not directly applicable) dictates MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) are explicitly matched based on extracted data and normalized comparison. No mismatches or uncertainties found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Documenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuellt ingripande.
